verifications.residual_pattern: temperature residual follows abnormal current elevation
verifications.temporal_pattern: short-lag persistence rather than isolated spike
verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: motor current changes can precede thermal response under abnormal load.

verifications.residual_pattern: current residual changes with voltage instability
verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: supply variation is a plausible condition for current response.

verifications.residual_pattern: pressure residual co-activates after flow-rate RMS deviation
verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: flow-rate RMS shifts can conditionally activate pressure response paths.

verifications.temporal_pattern: direction may reverse under control action
verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: reverse hydraulic direction should not be strongly activated without data support.

verifications.residual_pattern: vibration may be an effect rather than driver when flow anomaly dominates
verifications.temporal_pattern: suppress if vibration lags flow-rate deviation
verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: vibration-to-flow direction should be downweighted unless residual timing supports it.
